Off Calendar Aug-21-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Combs Reporting, inc., appears through Ken Combs.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative.
9:43am
Matter is submitted. The trial brief, lodged by the Court, is retained by Judge Sleight.
